items.title: Kenya to confront Russia over 'unacceptable' use of its nationals in combat
items.description: Nairobi says it has shut down illegal recruiters and will urge Moscow to sign a deal banning conscription.

items.title: Macron urges Europe to start acting like world power
items.description: The French president warns of growing threats from China, Russia and now the US, saying Europe faces a "wake-up call".

items.title: BP steps up cost cutting as profits slide
items.description: The oil giant also suspends its share buyback programme ahead of the arrival of its new boss.

items.title: 'Mum is still out there' - Savannah Guthrie issues new plea as ransom deadline passes
items.description: The video appeal came on the same day as a reported deadline to pay the people believed to be holding the TV presenter's 84-year-old mother.

items.title: Trump threatens to block opening of US-Canada bridge
items.description: The Gordie Howe International Bridge, which connects Michigan to Ontario, is set to open this year.
